attendees.hotTake: Will machine intelligence develop true taste and judgement? What's important for us to protect and cherish as we enter this new era of human-machine co-creation? As digital creators, we stand at a juncture that challenges us to look deep within to establish a new baseline for maintaining purpose, integrity and meaningful creative authorship.

attendees.name: Shane D'Costa
attendees.hotTake: AI influencing and influencers have hit the gay community like a brick thrown at Stonewall (there wasn't a brick thrown) BUT! It's apparent the people behind these gay AI influencer accounts on social media platforms are amassing large followings of REAL gay men. While this is exacerbating & proving the Dead Internet Theory, it is also creating grander, unrealistic standards for gay men. I don't believe this is just applicable to the LGBTQIA2S+, but it begs the question on "when are social media platforms going to disallow this type of social media farming?".
